languages.original_text: "I do not understand how a xenos can describe things that the Emperor's Angel is not given to see? You mean to cloud my judgement."

languages.text: "В толк не возьму, как чужачка может описывать вещи, которые Ангелу Императора видеть не дано? Ты пытаешься затуманить мой взгляд, элфкид".
languages.translation_comment: The characters came to medbay after the Rogue Trader allowed the use of augmentations on the bodies of commoners.

languages.text: "I do not understand how a xenos can describe things that the Emperor's Angel is not given to see? You mean to cloud my judgement."
languages.original_text: "В толк не возьму, как чужачка может описывать вещи, которые Ангелу Императора видеть не дано? Ты пытаешься затуманить мой взгляд, элфкид".

traits.locale_text: "I do not understand how a xenos can describe things that the Emperor's Angel is not given to see? You mean to cloud my judgement, aelfkid."
"I do not understand how a xenos can describe things that the Emperor's Angel is not given to see? You mean to cloud my judgement, aelfkid."
"I do not understand how a xenos can describe things that the Emperor's Angel is not given to see? You mean to cloud my judgement, aelfkid."

languages.text: 「異種が、皇帝の天使が見ることが許されていないものを説明するなんて理解できない。君が私の判断を曇らせようとしているのか」
languages.original_text: "I do not understand how a xenos can describe things that the Emperor's Angel is not given to see? You mean to cloud my judgement."

traits.locale_text: 「異種が、皇帝の天使が見ることが許されていないものを説明するなんて理解できない。君が私の判断を曇らせようとしているのか、アエルフキッド。」

languages.text: « Je ne comprends pas comment une xénos peut décrire des choses qu'un Ange de l'Empereur est incapable de voir. Vous cherchez à obscurcir mon jugement. »
languages.original_text: "I do not understand how a xenos can describe things that the Emperor's Angel is not given to see? You mean to cloud my judgement."

traits.locale_text: « Je ne comprends pas comment une xénos peut décrire des choses qu'un Ange de l'Empereur est incapable de voir. Vous cherchez à obscurcir mon jugement, aelfkid. »

languages.text: "Ich verstehe nicht, wie ein Xenos Dinge beschreiben kann, die der Engel des Imperators nicht zu sehen vermag? Ihr wollt mein Urteilsvermögen trüben."
languages.original_text: "I do not understand how a xenos can describe things that the Emperor's Angel is not given to see? You mean to cloud my judgement."

traits.locale_text: "Ich verstehe nicht, wie ein Xenos Dinge beschreiben kann, die der Engel des Imperators nicht zu sehen vermag? Ihr wollt mein Urteilsvermögen trüben, Aelfkid."

languages.text: "Bir zenonun İmparator'un Meleği'ne görmesi bahşedilmemiş şeyleri nasıl tarif edebildiğini anlamıyorum. Yargımı bulandırmaya çalışıyorsun."
languages.original_text: "I do not understand how a xenos can describe things that the Emperor's Angel is not given to see? You mean to cloud my judgement."

traits.locale_text: "Bir zenonun İmparator'un Meleği'ne görmesi bahşedilmemiş şeyleri nasıl tarif edebildiğini anlamıyorum. Yargımı bulandırmaya çalışıyorsun aelf dölü."

languages.text: «No comprendo cómo puede una xenos describir cosas que el Ángel del Emperador es incapaz de ver. ¡Solo pretendes nublar mi juicio!».
languages.original_text: "I do not understand how a xenos can describe things that the Emperor's Angel is not given to see? You mean to cloud my judgement."

traits.locale_text: «No comprendo cómo puede una xenos describir cosas que el Ángel del Emperador es incapaz de ver. ¡Solo pretendes nublar mi juicio, aelfkid!».

languages.text: “我不明白，一个异形怎能描述出连帝皇天使都无从得见的事物？你是想干扰我的判断吗？”
languages.original_text: "I do not understand how a xenos can describe things that the Emperor's Angel is not given to see? You mean to cloud my judgement."

traits.locale_text: “我不明白，一个异形怎能描述出连帝皇天使都无从得见的事物？你是想干扰我的判断吗，小精灵？”
